desc: B1 standard-boot follow-up after the direct-m1n1 B0 cold boot: prepare U-Boot T6040 support, preserve the proven kboot FDT, and host-validate a FIT/EFI path toward GRUB/systemd-boot. Ticket 080 decides whether U-Boot is unexpectedly required to package B0; otherwise do not let EFI block the first boot-picker-to-Alpine milestone. No rig or enrollment action until an exact artifact/preflight is separately reviewed.
author: claude
